ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0 = minor, 1 = major) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track (0.0 to 100.0) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "track_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "track_isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "track_lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track (if available) */,
  "track_language" TEXT /* Language of the track */,
  "track_explicit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "track_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the track's metadata was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "artist_genres" TEXT /* List of genres the artist is associated with */,
  "artist_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "artist_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist (0-100) */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "artist_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the artist's metadata was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_artists" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the track (e.g., main artist, featured artist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "album_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_label" TEXT /* Label of the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album (e.g., studio album, live album) */,
  "album_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the album's metadata was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_albums" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the track in the album */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number of the track in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_owner" INTEGER /* User who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the playlist is public */,
  "playlist_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the playlist was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_playlists" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the genre's metadata was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "user_profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_users" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "user_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., play, pause, skip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_history" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the track was played */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the play event */,
  "play_source" TEXT /* Source of the play event (e.g., mobile app, web app) */,
  "play_device" TEXT /* Device used for the play event (e.g., smartphone, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., mobile app, web app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
